message:
✨ Show provider name on channels, fix sidebar defaults (#33)

- Add provider name badge on channel rows (list + guide views)
- Remove channel numbers (meaningless index)
- Default sidebar sections to collapsed (except Favorites)
- Remove auto-expand of provider sections
- Watch providers/channels tables for live sidebar reload
- Fix providers screen back button (use pop instead of go)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
